zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger Kynaston於1433年出生時，他的父親Gruffudd Kynaston38歲，母親Margaret Jane Hoord36歲。他於1450年與Elizabeth Cobham結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1484年被列為made constable of hardley castle。他去世於1495年10月28日在英國英格蘭史洛普爾米德爾享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roger Kynaston于1433年出生时，他的父亲Gruffudd Kynaston38岁，母亲Margaret Jane Hoord36岁。他于1450年与Elizabeth Cobham结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1484年被列为made constable of hardley castle。他去世于1495年10月28日在英国英格兰史洛普爾米德爾享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kynaston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the three places called Kynaston: in Kinnerley (Shropshire), in Hentland (Herefordshire), or in Much Marcle (Herefordshire).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger Kynaston was born in 1433, his father, Gruffudd Kynaston, was 38 and his mother, Margaret Jane Hoord, was 36. He married Elizabeth Cobham in 1450. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1484, at the age of 51, his occupation is listed as made constable of hardley castle. He died on 28 October 1495, in Myddle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.Nannau, Merionethshire, , Wales: Nannau, Merionethshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger Kynaston est né en 1433, son père, Gruffudd Kynaston, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Margaret Jane Hoord, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Cobham en 1450. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1484, à l’âge de 51 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est made constable of hardley castle. Il est décédé le 28 octobre 1495, à Myddle, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger Kynaston 1433 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gruffudd Kynaston 38 und seine Mutter Margaret Jane Hoord 36. Er hat 1450 Elizabeth Cobham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1484, als er 51 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als made constable of hardley castle aufgeführt. Er starb am 28. Oktober 1495 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Myddle, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

ht.Nannau, Merionethshire, , Wales: Nannau, Merionethshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Kynaston è nato il nel 1433, il suo padre, Gruffudd Kynaston, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Jane Hoord, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Cobham nel 1450. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1484, all'età di 51 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come made constable of hardley castle. Morì il 28 ottobre 1495, nel Myddle, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Kynastonが1433年に生まれた時，父Gruffudd Kynastonは38歳，母Margaret Jane Hoordは36歳であった。1450年にElizabeth Cobhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1484年，51歳の時，職業はmade constable of hardley castleと記録されている。彼は1495年10月28日にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアムイッドルで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Kynaston(이)가 1433년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gruffudd Kynaston(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Jane Hoord(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1450년 Elizabeth Cobham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1484년, 51세의 나이로 그의 직업은 made constable of hardley castle이었다. 그는 1495년 10월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 마이들일에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger Kynaston nasceu em 1433, seu pai, Gruffudd Kynaston, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Jane Hoord, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Cobham em 1450. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1484, com 51 anos, sua profissão aparece como made constable of hardley castle. Ele faleceu em 28 de outubro de 1495, em Myddle, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ro.Nannau, Merionethshire, , Wales: Nannau, Merionethshire, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger Kynaston родился в 1433 г., его отцу по имени Gruffudd Kynaston было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Jane Hoord, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Cobham в 1450 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1484 году, в возрасте 51 год,  он работал по профессии made constable of hardley castle. Он умер 28 октября 1495 г. в местности миддл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.

sm.in both 1461 and 1470: mai le 1461 e o'o I le 1470

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Roger Kynaston nació en 1433, su papá, Gruffudd Kynaston, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Margaret Jane Hoord, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Cobham en 1450. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1484, a la edad de 51 años, su ocupación registrada era made constable of hardley castle. Murió el 28 de octubre de 1495, en Myddle, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años.
